reach_why: Mostly extends existing fallibilist caution about pre-formal explanations rather than opening clearly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links fallibilism, Deutschian reach, framework-dependence, and opaque strings under one agnostic evaluative stance.
falsifiable_why: Primarily methodological guidance; only indirectly testable by comparing later mathematical success against early verbal judgments.
explanation: Pre-mathematical novelty judgments are unreliable; suspend verdicts until mathematical articulation and framework integration arrive.
